channel.title: Learn Frontity with the brand new step-by-step tutorial
channel.description:
We’re delighted to announce that **our new step-by-step tutorial is now available**.
The step-by-step tutorial is a learning resource designed to guide you through the creation of a Frontity project from start to finish in a progressive and structured way.
Starting with the very basics you will learn to work with Frontity by building a fully-featured and fully-functional Frontity theme from the ground up.
The goal of the tutorial is to provide you with a deep and solid understanding of web development with Frontity, enabling you to approach the development of any Frontity project with confidence.
Each lesson in the tutorial builds on what was learned before and so you should work through the lessons in the order in which they are presented.
The Frontity step-by-step tutorial can be found at [tutorial.frontity.org](https://tutorial.frontity.org/).
For more information see our [blog post announcing its publication](https://frontity.org/blog/learn-frontity-with-our-new-step-by-step-tutorial/).
https://frontity.org/blog/learn-frontity-with-our-new-step-by-step-tutorial/

item.title: Learn Frontity with the brand new step-by-step tutorial
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
We’re delighted to announce that our new step-by-step tutorial is now available.

The step-by-step tutorial is a learning resource designed to guide you through the creation of a Frontity project from start to finish in a progressive and structured way.

Starting with the very basics you will learn to work with Frontity by building a fully-featured and fully-functional Frontity theme from the ground up.

The goal of the tutorial is to provide you with a deep and solid understanding of web development with Frontity, enabling you to approach the development of any Frontity project with confidence.

Each lesson in the tutorial builds on what was learned before and so you should work through the lessons in the order in which they are presented.

The Frontity step-by-step tutorial can be found at tutorial.frontity.org.

For more information see our blog post announcing its publication.

Frontity – 4 Feb 21

Learn Frontity with our New Step-by-Step Tutorial

Introducing Frontity's step-by-step tutorial, a learning resource designed to guide you through the creation of a Frontity project from start to finish.

Read full topic
item.source: Learn Frontity with the brand new step-by-step tutorial
